title: agoseris grandiflora var. laciniata
intro: Agoseris grandiflora var. laciniata, also known as the prickly sunflower or mountain dandelion, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Agoseris grandiflora var. laciniata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
